title: CHILDBIRTH CLASSES - 211info
text: WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS CHILDBIRTH CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers childbirth education classes. Options include a one-day class. 1075 SW Grandview Avenue Suite 200 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Expectant parents 30-32 weeks pregnant Hours: Saturdays; hours vary (541) 479-8386 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 479-8363 Main phone Main phone (541) 479-8386 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to reserve a spot FEES: $55 per class; may be covered by some insurance companies DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties Services: Childbirth Education Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BOOT CAMP FOR NEW DADS OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
